label: LE
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) identifies 'LE' as a fine-grained endothelial cell annotation under the broad 'Lymphatic endothelium' category in prenatal skin (Supplementary Table 3). The abbreviation LE is defined as 'lymphatic endothelium' in Fig. 1 legend. LE represents the mature lymphatic endothelial cell state in fetal skin, distinct from the earlier 'Early LE' population.
